payload.claim_text: The accrual variance for the month was unfavorable to the forecast primarily due to the timing of booking accruals by MTA Accounting, and the year-to-date variance was favorable to the forecast.
payload.subject: Petroleum Business Tax (PBT)

payload.claim_text: Year-to-date accrual variance was unfavorable. Results are being evaluated to ascertain if the unfavorable variance is real or if it reflects issues arising from the implementation of new tax rates for large employers in NYC that became effective in July 2023.
payload.subject: Payroll Mobility Tax (PMT)

tool_args.label: Urban Tax Accrual Variance Explanation - YTD

payload.claim_text: Year-to-date favorable variance was due to higher-than-forecasted commercial real estate transactions in New York City.
payload.subject: Urban Tax

tool_args.label: City Subsidy for MTA Bus Company - Month Explanation

payload.claim_text: Variance was mostly timing related. Drawdowns are related to the timing of cash obligations for MTA Bus.
payload.subject: City Subsidy for MTA Bus Company

payload.claim_text: Payroll Mobility Tax cash receipts were unfavorable for the month and YTD. Results are being evaluated to ascertain if the variance is real or if it reflects issues arising from the implementation of new tax rates for large employers in NYC that became effective in July 2023.
payload.subject: Payroll Mobility Tax (PMT)

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company is MTA agency
Staten Island Railway is MTA agency
Urban Tax Cash Variance Explanation - Month

payload.claim_text: The favorable variances for the month and YTD were due to higher-than-expected commercial real estate transactions in New York City.
payload.subject: Urban Tax

tool_args.label: Real Property Transfer Tax Cash Explanation - YTD

payload.claim_text: Real Property Transfer Tax Surcharge cash receipts for the month and YTD were favorable due to stronger-than-expected activity of large residential properties in NYC.
payload.subject: Real Property Transfer Tax Surcharge (Mansion)

tool_args.label: For-Hire Vehicle Surcharge Cash Variance - YTD

payload.claim_text: The cash variances for the month and YTD were unfavorable to the forecast due to lower-than-expected surcharge receipts.
payload.subject: For-Hire Vehicle Surcharge (Subway Action Plan Account)
